overall.description: Gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring dimly lit indoor hallways and rooms with a flashlight, then breaking through a window into a foggy outdoor courtyard surrounded by brick apartment buildings. The atmosphere is tense with heavy fog, desaturated colors, and detailed environmental storytelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow apartment hallway with pipes and doors

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through narrow corridors with flashlight illuminating the walls ahead

entered.detail: dimly lit corridor with worn wallpaper and wooden trim
exposed plumbing running vertically along the wall
closed wooden apartment door with dark finish
red fire extinguisher mounted on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow, dimly lit apartment hallway with a flashlight. Exposed pipes and a fire extinguisher are visible on the walls as he walks past closed wooden doors, turning corners through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen and office area of apartment

events.description: enters kitchen area with checkered floor from the hallway
moves from kitchen into adjacent office room with desk and computer

agents.ego_description: examining kitchen cabinets and furniture, then moving into office to look at desk and window

entered.detail: wooden kitchen cabinets with dark finish above counter
black and white checkered linoleum flooring in kitchen
white refrigerator with some items attached to front
wooden desk with papers and objects scattered on surface
old CRT monitor sitting on the desk
window with closed blinds showing grey light from outside

segments.scene_description: The character explores the apartment's interior, first entering a kitchen with checkered flooring and wooden cabinets, then moving into an office area containing a desk with an old computer and a window with blinds. The lighting remains dim and atmospheric throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy apartment courtyard with outdoor seating and brick walls

events.description: breaks through window with weapon and jumps down into foggy courtyard

agents.ego_description: having just exited the building through a broken window, now walking through the foggy courtyard examining the surroundings

entered.detail: tall red brick apartment building with multiple windows
window frame with shattered glass where the character exited
large patio umbrella with beige canopy
white plastic patio chairs arranged around tables
ornate black metal gate marking the courtyard exit
leafless tree against the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character breaks through a window to escape into a foggy outdoor courtyard surrounded by tall brick apartment buildings. The area contains scattered outdoor furniture including umbrellas and plastic chairs. Heavy fog limits visibility as the character walks across the concrete courtyard toward a metal gate in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic apartment interior that shifts from a narrow service corridor into a series of lived-in rooms. It begins with the character navigating a dimly lit hallway, where the flashlight beam catches exposed pipes and a fire extinguisher against the walls as he turns corners past closed wooden doors. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed corridor opens into a kitchen characterized by checkered flooring and wooden cabinets. The scene then shifts further into the apartment's interior, gliding from the kitchen into an office area containing a desk with an old computer. The movement finally settles near a window with blinds, maintaining a dim and atmospheric lighting throughout the exploration.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character escapes a confined interior into a desolate, fog-shrouded outdoor courtyard. It begins with the character breaking through a window, transitioning abruptly from the indoors to a concrete expanse enclosed by towering brick apartment buildings. As the camera moves forward, it passes scattered outdoor furniture, including plastic chairs and umbrellas, while heavy fog clings to the environment and obscures the distance. The scene then pushes deeper into the courtyard, maintaining a tense atmosphere as the character walks steadily toward a distant metal gate.
